overview: Kentuckiana Integrative Medicine provides regenerative, functional, and integrative medicine with a whole-person approach. The clinic specializes in injection therapies including PRP, Prolotherapy, and Prolozone to support the body's natural healing mechanisms.
highlights: Cellular Biologics and Platelet Rich Plasma injection therapies
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone replacement and patients of all ages looking for integrative approaches to chronic pain, musculoskeletal issues, and complex medical conditions.
